verses.latin_vulgate: Placuit Dario, et constituit super regnum satrapas centum viginti ut essent in toto regno suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁפַר֙ קֳדָ֣ם דָּרְיָ֔וֶשׁ וַהֲקִים֙ עַל־מַלְכוּתָ֔א לַאֲחַשְׁדַּרְפְּנַיָּ֖א מְאָ֣ה וְעֶשְׂרִ֑ין דִּ֥י לֶהֱוֺ֖ן בְּכׇל־מַלְכוּתָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: It seemed good to Darius, and he appointed over the kingdom a hundred and twenty governors, to be over his whole kingdom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Darius näki sen hyväksi panna koko valtakuntaan sata ja kaksikymmentä maanvanhinta.
verses.king_james: It pleased Darius to set over the kingdom an hundred and twenty princes, which should be over the whole kingdom;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et super eos principes tres, ex quibus Daniel unus erat : ut satrapæ illis redderent rationem, et rex non sustineret molestiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעֵ֤לָּא מִנְּהוֹן֙ סָרְכִ֣ין תְּלָתָ֔ה דִּ֥י דָנִיֵּ֖אל חַֽד־מִנְּה֑וֹן דִּֽי־לֶהֱוֺ֞ן אֲחַשְׁדַּרְפְּנַיָּ֣א אִלֵּ֗ין יָהֲבִ֤ין לְהוֹן֙ טַעְמָ֔א וּמַלְכָּ֖א לָֽא־לֶהֱוֵ֥א נָזִֽק׃
verses.douay_rheims: And three princes over them of whom Daniel was one: that the governors might give an account to them, and the king might have no trouble.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näiden päälle pani hän kolme päämiestä, joista Daniel yksi oli, joille maanvanhimmat piti luvun tekemän, ettei kuningas kärsisi vahinkoa.
verses.king_james: And over these three presidents; of whom Daniel was first: that the princes might give accounts unto them, and the king should have no damage.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur Daniel superabat omnes principes et satrapas, quia spiritus Dei amplior erat in illo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱדַ֙יִן֙ דָּנִיֵּ֣אל דְּנָ֔ה הֲוָ֣א מִתְנַצַּ֔ח עַל־סָרְכַיָּ֖א וַאֲחַשְׁדַּרְפְּנַיָּ֑א כׇּל־קֳבֵ֗ל דִּ֣י ר֤וּחַ יַתִּירָא֙ בֵּ֔הּ וּמַלְכָּ֣א עֲשִׁ֔ית לַהֲקָמוּתֵ֖הּ עַל־כׇּל־מַלְכוּתָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Daniel excelled all the princes, and governors: because a greater spirit of God was in him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Daniel voitti kaikki päämiehet ja maanvanhimmat, sillä hänessä oli korkiampi henki. Sentähden ajatteli kuningas pannaksensa hänet koko valtakunnan päälle.
verses.king_james: Then this Daniel was preferred above the presidents and princes, because an excellent spirit was in him; and the king thought to set him over the whole realm.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro rex cogitabat constituere eum super omne regnum : unde principes, et satrapæ quærebant occasionem ut invenirent Danieli ex latere regis : nullamque causam, et suspicionem reperire potuerunt, eo quod fidelis esset, et omnis culpa, et suspicio non inveniretur in eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱדַ֨יִן סָֽרְכַיָּ֜א וַאֲחַשְׁדַּרְפְּנַיָּ֗א הֲו֨וֹ בָעַ֧יִן עִלָּ֛ה לְהַשְׁכָּחָ֥ה לְדָנִיֵּ֖אל מִצַּ֣ד מַלְכוּתָ֑א וְכׇל־עִלָּ֨ה וּשְׁחִיתָ֜ה לָא־יָכְלִ֣ין לְהַשְׁכָּחָ֗ה כׇּל־קֳבֵל֙ דִּֽי־מְהֵימַ֣ן ה֔וּא וְכׇל־שָׁלוּ֙ וּשְׁחִיתָ֔ה לָ֥א הִשְׁתְּכַ֖חַת עֲלֽוֹהִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king thought to set him over all the kingdom; whereupon the princes, and the governors, sought to find occasion against Daniel, with regard to the king: and they could find no cause, nor suspicion, because he was faithful, and no fault, nor suspicion was found in him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jonka tähden päämiehet ja maanvanhimmat etsivät syytä Danielia vastaan valtakunnan puolesta, vaan ei he taitaneet yhtään syytä eikä rikosta löytää, sillä hän oli uskollinen, ettei hänessä mitään vikaa eikä rikosta löytää taidettu.
verses.king_james: Then the presidents and princes sought to find occasion against Daniel concerning the kingdom; but they could find none occasion nor fault; forasmuch as he was faithful, neither was there any error or fault found in him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixerunt ergo viri illi : Non inveniemus Danieli huic aliquam occasionem, nisi forte in lege Dei sui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱ֠דַ֠יִן גֻּבְרַיָּ֤א אִלֵּךְ֙ אָֽמְרִ֔ין דִּ֣י לָ֧א נְהַשְׁכַּ֛ח לְדָנִיֵּ֥אל דְּנָ֖ה כׇּל־עִלָּ֑ה לָהֵ֕ן הַשְׁכַּ֥חְנָֽא עֲל֖וֹהִי בְּדָ֥ת אֱלָהֵֽהּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Then these men said: We shall not find any occasion against this Daniel, unless perhaps concerning the law of his God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoivat ne miehet: Emme löydä yhtään syytä tämän Danielin kanssa, ellemme löydä hänen Jumalansa palveluksessa.
verses.king_james: Then said these men, We shall not find any occasion against this Daniel, except we find it against him concerning the law of his God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc principes et satrapæ surripuerunt regi, et sic locuti sunt ei : Dari rex, in æternum vive !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱ֠דַ֠יִן סָרְכַיָּ֤א וַאֲחַשְׁדַּרְפְּנַיָּא֙ אִלֵּ֔ן הַרְגִּ֖שׁוּ עַל־מַלְכָּ֑א וְכֵן֙ אָמְרִ֣ין לֵ֔הּ דָּרְיָ֥וֶשׁ מַלְכָּ֖א לְעָלְמִ֥ין חֱיִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then the princes, and the governors, craftily suggested to the king, and spoke thus unto him: King Darius, live for ever:
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin tulivat päämiehet ja maanvanhimmat joukoittain kuninkaan eteen ja sanoivat hänelle näin: Kuningas Darius eläköön kauvan!
verses.king_james: Then these presidents and princes assembled together to the king, and said thus unto him, King Darius, live for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: consilium inierunt omnes principes regni tui, magistratus, et satrapæ, senatores, et judices, ut decretum imperatorium exeat, et edictum : ut omnis, qui petierit aliquam petitionem a quocumque deo et homine usque ad triginta dies, nisi a te, rex, mittatur in lacum leonum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִתְיָעַ֜טוּ כֹּ֣ל ׀ סָרְכֵ֣י מַלְכוּתָ֗א סִגְנַיָּ֤א וַֽאֲחַשְׁדַּרְפְּנַיָּא֙ הַדָּֽבְרַיָּ֣א וּפַחֲוָתָ֔א לְקַיָּמָ֤ה קְיָם֙ מַלְכָּ֔א וּלְתַקָּפָ֖ה אֱסָ֑ר דִּ֣י כׇל־דִּֽי־יִבְעֵ֣א בָ֠ע֠וּ מִן־כׇּל־אֱלָ֨הּ וֶֽאֱנָ֜שׁ עַד־יוֹמִ֣ין תְּלָתִ֗ין לָהֵן֙ מִנָּ֣ךְ מַלְכָּ֔א יִתְרְמֵ֕א לְגֹ֖ב אַרְיָוָתָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: All the princes of the kingdom, the magistrates, and governors, the senators, and judges, have consulted together, that an imperial decree, and an edict be published: That whosoever shall ask any petition of any god, or man, for thirty days, but of thee, O king, shall be cast into the den of the lions.
verses.finnish_biblia: Valtakunnan päämiehet, herrat, maanvanhimmat, neuvonantajat ja valtamiehet ovat ajatelleet, että kuninkaallinen käsky annettaisiin ja ankara kielto, että jos joku kolmenakymmenenä päivänä joltakulta jumalalta eli ihmiseltä, paitsi sinulta, kuningas, ainoasti jotakin anoo, pitää jalopeurain luolaan heitettämän.
verses.king_james: All the presidents of the kingdom, the governors, and the princes, the counsellors, and the captains, have consulted together to establish a royal statute, and to make a firm decree, that whosoever shall ask a petition of any God or man for thirty days, save of thee, O king, he shall be cast into the den of lions.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc itaque rex, confirma sententiam, et scribe decretum : ut non immutetur quod statutum est a Medis et Persis, nec prævaricari cuiquam liceat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּעַ֣ן מַלְכָּ֔א תְּקִ֥ים אֱסָרָ֖א וְתִרְשֻׁ֣ם כְּתָבָ֑א דִּ֣י לָ֧א לְהַשְׁנָיָ֛ה כְּדָת־מָדַ֥י וּפָרַ֖ס דִּי־לָ֥א תֶעְדֵּֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now, therefore, O king, confirm the sentence, and sign the decree: that what is decreed by the Medes and Persians may not be altered, nor any man be allowed to transgress it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden, herra kuningas, vahvista se käsky ja kirjoita alle, ettei sitä jälleen muutettaisi, Mediläisten ja Persian oikeuden jälkeen, jota ei kenkään rikkoa tohdi.
verses.king_james: Now, O king, establish the decree, and sign the writing, that it be not changed, according to the law of the Medes and Persians, which altereth not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro rex Darius proposuit edictum, et statuit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־קֳבֵ֖ל דְּנָ֑ה מַלְכָּא֙ דָּֽרְיָ֔וֶשׁ רְשַׁ֥ם כְּתָבָ֖א וֶאֱסָרָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: So king Darius set forth the decree, and established it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin kirjoitti kuningas Darius sen kirjoituksen ja käskyn alle.
verses.king_james: Wherefore king Darius signed the writing and the decree.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod cum Daniel comperisset, id est, constitutam legem, ingressus est domum suam : et fenestris apertis in cœnaculo suo contra Jerusalem tribus temporibus in die flectebat genua sua, et adorabat, confitebaturque coram Deo suo sicut et ante facere consueverat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֠דָנִיֵּ֠אל כְּדִ֨י יְדַ֜ע דִּֽי־רְשִׁ֤ים כְּתָבָא֙ עַ֣ל לְבַיְתֵ֔הּ וְכַוִּ֨ין פְּתִיחָ֥ן לֵהּ֙ בְּעִלִּיתֵ֔הּ נֶ֖גֶד יְרוּשְׁלֶ֑ם וְזִמְנִין֩ תְּלָתָ֨ה בְיוֹמָ֜א ה֣וּא ׀ בָּרֵ֣ךְ עַל־בִּרְכ֗וֹהִי וּמְצַלֵּ֤א וּמוֹדֵא֙ קֳדָ֣ם אֱלָהֵ֔הּ כׇּל־קֳבֵל֙ דִּֽי־הֲוָ֣א עָבֵ֔ד מִן־קַדְמַ֖ת דְּנָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Now, when Daniel knew this, that is to say, that the law was made, he went into his house: and opening the windows in his upper chamber towards Jerusalem, he knelt down three times a day, and adored and gave thanks before his God, as he had been accustomed to do before.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Daniel sai tietää kirjoitetuksi sen käskyn alle, meni hän ylös huoneesensa, ja hänen suvihuoneensa akkunat olivat avoimet Jerusalemia päin, ja lankesi kolme kertaa päivässä polvillensa; rukoili, kiitti ja ylisti Jumalaansa, niinkuin hänen tapansa oli ennenkin tehdä.
verses.king_james: Now when Daniel knew that the writing was signed, he went into his house; and his windows being open in his chamber toward Jerusalem, he kneeled upon his knees three times a day, and prayed, and gave thanks before his God, as he did aforetime.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viri ergo illi curiosius inquirentes invenerunt Danielem orantem, et obsecrantem Deum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱ֠דַ֠יִן גֻּבְרַיָּ֤א אִלֵּךְ֙ הַרְגִּ֔שׁוּ וְהַשְׁכַּ֖חוּ לְדָנִיֵּ֑אל בָּעֵ֥ה וּמִתְחַנַּ֖ן קֳדָ֥ם אֱלָהֵֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Wherefore those men carefully watching him, found Daniel praying and making supplication to his God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin tulivat ne miehet joukoittain ja löysivät Danielin rukoilevan ja avuksensa huutavan Jumalaansa.
verses.king_james: Then these men assembled, and found Daniel praying and making supplication before his God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et accedentes locuti sunt regi super edicto : Rex, numquid non constituisti ut omnis homo qui rogaret quemquam de diis et hominibus usque ad dies triginta, nisi te, rex, mitteretur in lacum leonum ? Ad quos respondens rex, ait : Verus est sermo juxta decretum Medorum atque Persarum, quod prævaricari non licet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּ֠אדַ֠יִן קְרִ֨בוּ וְאָמְרִ֥ין קֳדָם־מַלְכָּא֮ עַל־אֱסָ֣ר מַלְכָּא֒ הֲלָ֧א אֱסָ֣ר רְשַׁ֗מְתָּ דִּ֣י כׇל־אֱנָ֡שׁ דִּֽי־יִבְעֵא֩ מִן־כׇּל־אֱלָ֨הּ וֶֽאֱנָ֜שׁ עַד־יוֹמִ֣ין תְּלָתִ֗ין לָהֵן֙ מִנָּ֣ךְ מַלְכָּ֔א יִתְרְמֵ֕א לְג֖וֹב אַרְיָוָתָ֑א עָנֵ֨ה מַלְכָּ֜א וְאָמַ֗ר יַצִּיבָ֧א מִלְּתָ֛א כְּדָת־מָדַ֥י וּפָרַ֖ס דִּי־לָ֥א תֶעְדֵּֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they came and spoke to the king concerning the edict: O king, hast thou not decreed, that every man that should make a request to any of the gods, or men, for thirty days, but to thyself, O king, should be cast into the den of the lions? And the king answered them, saying: The word is true, according to the decree of the Medes and Persians, which it is not lawful to violate.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin he astuivat edes ja puhuivat kuninkaan kanssa siitä kuninkaallisesta käskystä ja sanoivat: Etkös kirjoittanut käskyn alle, että jos joku ihminen kolmenakymmenenä päivänä jotakin anova olis joltakulta jumalalta eli ihmiseltä, paitsi sinulta ainoastansa, kuningas, se pitää jalopeurain luolaan heitettämän? Kuningas vastasi ja sanoi: Se on tosi, ja Mediläisten ja Persialaisten oikeutta ei pidä kenenkään rikkoman.
verses.king_james: Then they came near, and spake before the king concerning the king’s decree; Hast thou not signed a decree, that every man that shall ask a petition of any God or man within thirty days, save of thee, O king, shall be cast into the den of lions? The king answered and said, The thing is true, according to the law of the Medes and Persians, which altereth not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc respondentes dixerunt coram rege : Daniel de filiis captivitatis Juda, non curavit de lege tua, et de edicto quod constituisti : sed tribus temporibus per diem orat obsecratione sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּ֠אדַ֠יִן עֲנ֣וֹ וְאָמְרִין֮ קֳדָ֣ם מַלְכָּא֒ דִּ֣י דָנִיֵּ֡אל דִּי֩ מִן־בְּנֵ֨י גָלוּתָ֜א דִּ֣י יְה֗וּד לָא־שָׂ֨ם (עליך) [עֲלָ֤ךְ] מַלְכָּא֙ טְעֵ֔ם וְעַל־אֱסָרָ֖א דִּ֣י רְשַׁ֑מְתָּ וְזִמְנִ֤ין תְּלָתָה֙ בְּיוֹמָ֔א בָּעֵ֖א בָּעוּתֵֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Then they answered, and said before the king: Daniel, who is of the children of the captivity of Juda, hath not regarded thy law, nor the decree that thou hast made: but three times a day he maketh his prayer.
verses.finnish_biblia: He vastasivat ja sanoivat kuninkaalle: Daniel, yksi Juudalaisista vangeista, ei tottele sinua, herra kuningas, eikä sinun käskyäs, jonka allekirjoittanut olet; sillä hän rukoilee kolmasti päivässä.
verses.king_james: Then answered they and said before the king, That Daniel, which is of the children of the captivity of Judah, regardeth not thee, O king, nor the decree that thou hast signed, but maketh his petition three times a day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod verbum cum audisset rex, satis contristatus est : et pro Daniele posuit cor ut liberaret eum, et usque ad occasum solis laborabat ut erueret illum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱדַ֨יִן מַלְכָּ֜א כְּדִ֧י מִלְּתָ֣א שְׁמַ֗ע שַׂגִּיא֙ בְּאֵ֣שׁ עֲל֔וֹהִי וְעַ֧ל דָּנִיֵּ֛אל שָׂ֥ם בָּ֖ל לְשֵׁיזָבוּתֵ֑הּ וְעַד֙ מֶֽעָלֵ֣י שִׁמְשָׁ֔א הֲוָ֥א מִשְׁתַּדַּ֖ר לְהַצָּלוּתֵֽהּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Now when the king had heard these words, he was very much grieved, and in behalf of Daniel he set his heart to deliver him, and even till sunset he laboured to save him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Kuningas sen kuuli, tuli hän sangen murheelliseksi ja ahkeroitsi suuresti, että hän Danielin vapahtais; ja vaivasi itsiänsä auringon laskemaan asti, että hän hänet pelastais.
verses.king_james: Then the king, when he heard these words, was sore displeased with himself, and set his heart on Daniel to deliver him: and he laboured till the going down of the sun to deliver him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viri autem illi, intelligentes regem, dixerunt ei : Scito, rex, quia lex Medorum atque Persarum est ut omne decretum, quod constituerit rex, non liceat immutari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּאדַ֙יִן֙ גֻּבְרַיָּ֣א אִלֵּ֔ךְ הַרְגִּ֖שׁוּ עַל־מַלְכָּ֑א וְאָמְרִ֣ין לְמַלְכָּ֗א דַּ֤ע מַלְכָּא֙ דִּֽי־דָת֙ לְמָדַ֣י וּפָרַ֔ס דִּֽי־כׇל־אֱסָ֥ר וּקְיָ֛ם דִּֽי־מַלְכָּ֥א יְהָקֵ֖ים לָ֥א לְהַשְׁנָיָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But those men perceiving the king's design, said to him: Know thou, O king, that the law of the Medes and Persians is, that no decree which the king hath made, may be altered.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan ne miehet tulivat joukoittain kuninkaan tykö ja sanoivat hänelle: Tiedä, herra kuningas, että Mediläisten ja Persialaisten oikeus on, että kaikki kiellot ja käskyt, joita kuningas päättänyt on, pitää muuttumattomat oleman.
verses.king_james: Then these men assembled unto the king, and said unto the king, Know, O king, that the law of the Medes and Persians is, That no decree nor statute which the king establisheth may be changed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc rex præcepit, et adduxerunt Danielem, et miserunt eum in lacum leonum. Dixitque rex Danieli : Deus tuus, quem colis semper, ipse liberabit te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּאדַ֜יִן מַלְכָּ֣א אֲמַ֗ר וְהַיְתִיו֙ לְדָ֣נִיֵּ֔אל וּרְמ֕וֹ לְגֻבָּ֖א דִּ֣י אַרְיָוָתָ֑א עָנֵ֤ה מַלְכָּא֙ וְאָמַ֣ר לְדָנִיֵּ֔אל אֱלָהָ֗ךְ דִּ֣י (אנתה) [אַ֤נְתְּ] פָּֽלַֽח־לֵהּ֙ בִּתְדִירָ֔א ה֖וּא יְשֵׁיזְבִנָּֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then the king commanded, and they brought Daniel, and cast him into the den of the lions. And the king said to Daniel: Thy God, whom thou always servest, he will deliver thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin kuningas käski, ja he toivat Danielin edes ja heittivät hänet jalopeurain luolaan. Mutta kuningas puhui ja sanoi Danielille: Sinun Jumalas, jotas lakkaamata palvelet, auttakoon Sinua!
verses.king_james: Then the king commanded, and they brought Daniel, and cast him into the den of lions. Now the king spake and said unto Daniel, Thy God whom thou servest continually, he will deliver thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Allatusque est lapis unus, et positus est super os laci : quem obsignavit rex annulo suo, et annulo optimatum suorum, ne quid fieret contra Danielem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֵיתָ֙יִת֙ אֶ֣בֶן חֲדָ֔ה וְשֻׂמַ֖ת עַל־פֻּ֣ם גֻּבָּ֑א וְחַתְמַ֨הּ מַלְכָּ֜א בְּעִזְקְתֵ֗הּ וּבְעִזְקָת֙ רַבְרְבָנ֔וֹהִי דִּ֛י לָא־תִשְׁנֵ֥א צְב֖וּ בְּדָנִיֵּֽאל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And a stone was brought, and laid upon the mouth of the den: which the king sealed with his own ring, and with the ring of his nobles, that nothing should be done against Daniel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he toivat kiven ja panivat luolan ovelle: Sen painoi kuningas omalla sinetillänsä ja voimallistensa sinetillä, ettei kuninkaan tahto muutettaisi Danielia vastaan.
verses.king_james: And a stone was brought, and laid upon the mouth of the den; and the king sealed it with his own signet, and with the signet of his lords; that the purpose might not be changed concerning Daniel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et abiit rex in domum suam, et dormivit incœnatus, cibique non sunt allati coram eo, insuper et somnus recessit ab eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱ֠דַ֠יִן אֲזַ֨ל מַלְכָּ֤א לְהֵֽיכְלֵהּ֙ וּבָ֣ת טְוָ֔ת וְדַחֲוָ֖ן לָא־הַנְעֵ֣ל קׇֽדָמ֑וֹהִי וְשִׁנְתֵּ֖הּ נַדַּ֥ת עֲלֽוֹהִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king went away to his house, and laid himself down without taking supper, and meat was not set before him, and even sleep departed from him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas meni linnaansa ja kulutti yön syömättä ja ei antanut mitään huvitusta tuoda eteensä, eikä myös yhtään unta saanut.
verses.king_james: Then the king went to his palace, and passed the night fasting: neither were instruments of musick brought before him: and his sleep went from him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc rex primo diluculo consurgens, festinus ad lacum leonum perrexit :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּאדַ֣יִן מַלְכָּ֔א בִּשְׁפַּרְפָּרָ֖א יְק֣וּם בְּנׇגְהָ֑א וּ֨בְהִתְבְּהָלָ֔ה לְגֻבָּ֥א דִֽי־אַרְיָוָתָ֖א אֲזַֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then the king rising very early in the morning, went in haste to the lions' den:
verses.finnish_biblia: Aamulla varhain päivän koittaissa nousi kuningas ylös ja meni kiiruusti jalopeurain luolan tykö.
verses.king_james: Then the king arose very early in the morning, and went in haste unto the den of lions.

verses.latin_vulgate: appropinquansque lacui, Danielem voce lacrimabili inclamavit, et affatus est eum : Daniel serve Dei viventis, Deus tuus, cui tu servis semper, putasne valuit te liberare a leonibus ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּכְמִקְרְבֵ֣הּ לְגֻבָּ֔א לְדָ֣נִיֵּ֔אל בְּקָ֥ל עֲצִ֖יב זְעִ֑ק עָנֵ֨ה מַלְכָּ֜א וְאָמַ֣ר לְדָנִיֵּ֗אל דָּֽנִיֵּאל֙ עֲבֵד֙ אֱלָהָ֣א חַיָּ֔א אֱלָהָ֗ךְ דִּ֣י (אנתה) [אַ֤נְתְּ] פָּֽלַֽח־לֵהּ֙ בִּתְדִירָ֔א הַיְכִ֥ל לְשֵׁיזָבוּתָ֖ךְ מִן־אַרְיָוָתָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And coming near to the den, cried with a lamentable voice to Daniel, and said to him: Daniel, servant of the living God, hath thy God, whom thou servest always, been able, thinkest thou, to deliver thee from the lions?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin hän luolan tykö lähestyi, huusi hän Danielia surkialla äänellä ja kuningas puhui ja sanoi Danielille: Daniel, sinä elävän Jumalan palvelia, onko Jumalas, jotas ilman lakkaamata palvelet, voinut sinut jalopeuroilta pelastaa?
verses.king_james: And when he came to the den, he cried with a lamentable voice unto Daniel: and the king spake and said to Daniel, O Daniel, servant of the living God, is thy God, whom thou servest continually, able to deliver thee from the lions?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Daniel regi respondens ait : Rex, in æternum vive !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱדַ֙יִן֙ דָּנִיֵּ֔אל עִם־מַלְכָּ֖א מַלִּ֑ל מַלְכָּ֖א לְעָלְמִ֥ין חֱיִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Daniel answering the king, said: O king, live for ever:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Daniel puhui kuninkaan kanssa sanoen: Kuningas eläköön kauvan!
verses.king_james: Then said Daniel unto the king, O king, live for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus meus misit angelum suum, et conclusit ora leonum, et non nocuerunt mihi : quia coram eo justitia inventa est in me : sed et coram te, rex, delictum non feci.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱלָהִ֞י שְׁלַ֣ח מַלְאֲכֵ֗הּ וּֽסְגַ֛ר פֻּ֥ם אַרְיָוָתָ֖א וְלָ֣א חַבְּל֑וּנִי כׇּל־קֳבֵ֗ל דִּ֤י קׇֽדָמ֙וֹהִי֙ זָכוּ֙ הִשְׁתְּכַ֣חַת לִ֔י וְאַ֤ף (קדמיך) [קׇֽדָמָךְ֙] מַלְכָּ֔א חֲבוּלָ֖ה לָ֥א עַבְדֵֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: My God hath sent his angel, and hath shut up the mouths of the lions, and they have not hurt me: forasmuch as before him justice hath been found in me: yea, and before thee, O king, I have done no offence.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun Jumalani on lähettänyt enkelinsä, joka jalopeurain kidat on pitänyt kiinni, ettei he minulle mitään pahaa tehneet ole, sillä minä olen hänen edessänsä viattomaksi löydetty. En myös ole minä sinua vastaan, herra kuningas, mitään tehnyt.
verses.king_james: My God hath sent his angel, and hath shut the lions’ mouths, that they have not hurt me: forasmuch as before him innocency was found in me; and also before thee, O king, have I done no hurt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc vehementer rex gavisus est super eo, et Danielem præcepit educi de lacu : eductusque est Daniel de lacu, et nulla læsio inventa est in eo, quia credidit Deo suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּאדַ֣יִן מַלְכָּ֗א שַׂגִּיא֙ טְאֵ֣ב עֲל֔וֹהִי וּלְדָ֣נִיֵּ֔אל אֲמַ֖ר לְהַנְסָקָ֣ה מִן־גֻּבָּ֑א וְהֻסַּ֨ק דָּנִיֵּ֜אל מִן־גֻּבָּ֗א וְכׇל־חֲבָל֙ לָא־הִשְׁתְּכַ֣ח בֵּ֔הּ דִּ֖י הֵימִ֥ן בֵּאלָהֵֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then was the king exceeding glad for him, and he commanded that Daniel should be taken out of the den: and Daniel was taken out of the den, and no hurt was found in him, because he believed in his God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin kuningas ihastui siitä suuresti, ja käski Danielin luolasta ylös ottaa. Ja he ottivat Danielin ylös luolasta, ja ei hänessä yhtään haavaa löydetty, sillä hän oli turvannut Jumalaansa.
verses.king_james: Then was the king exceeding glad for him, and commanded that they should take Daniel up out of the den. So Daniel was taken up out of the den, and no manner of hurt was found upon him, because he believed in his God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jubente autem rege, adducti sunt viri illi, qui accusaverant Danielem : et in lacum leonum missi sunt, ipsi, et filii, et uxores eorum : et non pervenerunt usque ad pavimentum laci, donec arriperent eos leones, et omnia ossa eorum comminuerunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲמַ֣ר מַלְכָּ֗א וְהַיְתִ֞יו גֻּבְרַיָּ֤א אִלֵּךְ֙ דִּֽי־אֲכַ֤לוּ קַרְצ֙וֹהִי֙ דִּ֣י דָֽנִיֵּ֔אל וּלְג֤וֹב אַרְיָוָתָא֙ רְמ֔וֹ אִנּ֖וּן בְּנֵיה֣וֹן וּנְשֵׁיה֑וֹן וְלָֽא־מְט֞וֹ לְאַרְעִ֣ית גֻּבָּ֗א עַ֠ד דִּֽי־שְׁלִ֤טֽוּ בְהוֹן֙ אַרְיָ֣וָתָ֔א וְכׇל־גַּרְמֵיה֖וֹן הַדִּֽקוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And by the king's commandment, those men were brought that had accused Daniel: and they were cast into the lions' den, they and their children, and their wives: and they did not reach the bottom of the den, before the lions caught them, and broke all their bones in pieces.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin käski kuningas; ja ne miehet tuotiin edes, jotka olivat kantaneet Danielin päälle, ja jalopeurain luolaan heitettiin lapsinensa ja vaimoinensa. Ja ennenkuin he luolan pohjaan tulivat, tarttuivat heihin jalopeurat ja murensivat heidän luunsakin.
verses.king_james: And the king commanded, and they brought those men which had accused Daniel, and they cast them into the den of lions, them, their children, and their wives; and the lions had the mastery of them, and brake all their bones in pieces or ever they came at the bottom of the den.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc Darius rex scripsit universis populis, tribubus, et linguis habitantibus in universa terra : Pax vobis multiplicetur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּאדַ֜יִן דָּרְיָ֣וֶשׁ מַלְכָּ֗א כְּ֠תַ֠ב לְֽכׇל־עַֽמְמַיָּ֞א אֻמַּיָּ֧א וְלִשָּׁנַיָּ֛א דִּֽי־[דָיְרִ֥ין] (דארין) בְּכׇל־אַרְעָ֖א שְׁלָמְכ֥וֹן יִשְׂגֵּֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then king Darius wrote to all people, tribes, and languages, dwelling in the whole earth: PEACE be multiplied unto you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin antoi kuningas Darius kirjoittaa kaikille kansoille, sukukunnille ja kielille, jotka asuvat kaikessa maassa: Teille olkoon paljon rauhaa!
verses.king_james: Then king Darius wrote unto all people, nations, and languages, that dwell in all the earth; Peace be multiplied unto you.

verses.latin_vulgate: A me constitutum est decretum, ut in universo imperio et regno meo, tremiscant et paveant Deum Danielis : ipse est enim Deus vivens, et æternus in sæcula, et regnum ejus non dissipabitur, et potestas ejus usque in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִן־קֳדָמַי֮ שִׂ֣ים טְעֵם֒ דִּ֣י ׀ בְּכׇל־שׇׁלְטָ֣ן מַלְכוּתִ֗י לֶהֱוֺ֤ן (זאעין) [זָיְעִין֙] וְדָ֣חֲלִ֔ין מִן־קֳדָ֖ם אֱלָהֵ֣הּ דִּי־דָֽנִיֵּ֑אל דִּי־ה֣וּא ׀ אֱלָהָ֣א חַיָּ֗א וְקַיָּם֙ לְעָ֣לְמִ֔ין וּמַלְכוּתֵהּ֙ דִּֽי־לָ֣א תִתְחַבַּ֔ל וְשׇׁלְטָנֵ֖הּ עַד־סוֹפָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: It is decreed by me, that in all my empire and my kingdom, all men dread and fear the God of Daniel. For he is the living and eternal God for ever: and his kingdom shall not be destroyed, and his power shall be for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Se käsky on minulta asetettu, että kaikessa minun kuninkaan valtakunnassani Danielin Jumalaa peljättämän ja vavistaman pitää, sillä hän on elävä Jumala, joka ijankaikkisesti pysyy, ja hänen valtakuntansa on katoomatoin, ja hänen voimansa loppumatoin.
verses.king_james: I make a decree, That in every dominion of my kingdom men tremble and fear before the God of Daniel: for he is the living God, and stedfast for ever, and his kingdom that which shall not be destroyed, and his dominion shall be even unto the end.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse liberator atque salvator, faciens signa et mirabilia in cælo et in terra : qui liberavit Danielem de lacu leonum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְשֵׁיזִ֣ב וּמַצִּ֔ל וְעָבֵד֙ אָתִ֣ין וְתִמְהִ֔ין בִּשְׁמַיָּ֖א וּבְאַרְעָ֑א דִּ֚י שֵׁיזִ֣ב לְדָֽנִיֵּ֔אל מִן־יַ֖ד אַרְיָוָתָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: He is the deliverer, and saviour, doing signs and wonders in heaven, and in earth: who hath delivered Daniel out of the lions' den.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän on vapahtaja ja hädässä auttaja, ja hän tekee tunnustähtiä ja ihmeitä sekä taivaassa että maan päällä. Hän on Danielin jalopeurain käsistä pelastanut.
verses.king_james: He delivereth and rescueth, and he worketh signs and wonders in heaven and in earth, who hath delivered Daniel from the power of the lions.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Daniel perseveravit usque ad regnum Darii, regnumque Cyri Persæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְדָנִיֵּ֣אל דְּנָ֔ה הַצְלַ֖ח בְּמַלְכ֣וּת דָּרְיָ֑וֶשׁ וּבְמַלְכ֖וּת כּ֥וֹרֶשׁ (פרסיא) [פָּרְסָאָֽה]׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Now Daniel continued unto the reign of Darius, and the reign of Cyrus, the Persian.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Daniel tuli voimalliseksi Dariuksen valtakunnassa ja Koreksen Persialaisen valtakunnassa.
verses.king_james: So this Daniel prospered in the reign of Darius, and in the reign of Cyrus the Persian.
